testcase.name: titleverify

failure.message: expected [Amazon.com: Online Shopping for Electronics, Apparel, Computers, Books, DVDs & more] but found [Amazon.com. Spend less. Smile more.]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [Amazon.com: Online Shopping for Electronics, Apparel, Computers, Books, DVDs & more] but found [Amazon.com. Spend less. Smile more.] at co.amazon.tests.HomepageTest.titleverify(HomepageTest.java:28) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) ... Removed 38 stack frames
